text.title: QA Bug Bash Runbook Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the playbook-step artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-qa-bug-bash-runbook.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: duration_minutes>60; charters empty; findings without repro; severity not in S0..S3.
